text: How Pleasant to Live in Harmony!

segments.text: Behold, how good and pleasant it iswhen brothers live together in harmony!
It is like fine oil on the head, running down on the beard, running down Aaron’s beardover the collar of his robes.
It is like the dew of Hermonfalling on the mountains of Zion. For there the LORD has bestowed the blessingof life forevermore.
